steps.title: Locate x = 3 on the line of best fit
steps.content: Find age 3 on the horizontal axis. Trace vertically upward from x = 3 until you reach the line of best fit. Then read horizontally left to the y-axis to find the predicted body length. The line of best fit crosses x = 3 at approximately 100 cm.

steps.title: Round to the nearest 10 cm
steps.content: The value we read from the graph is 100 cm. Since 100 is already a multiple of 10, no rounding adjustment is needed. The predicted body length is 100 cm.
